title: Warehouse Receipt
description: Warehouse Receipt v1 contract. Inventory increases only at Warehouse Receipt Confirmed and only for RELEASED batches.
$comment: Sources: PACK-01 warehouse receipt and inventory boundary; canonical FRM-22 finished goods warehouse receipt.

receipt_confirmed.description: True when receipt has been confirmed.

inventory_ledger_entry_id.description: Ledger entry created by confirmed receipt.

misa_checkpoint_eligible.description: Whether confirmed receipt can create a MISA handoff checkpoint.
